name: @web_of_trust/e2e-log-sync
description: Slice A / VE-11 — end-to-end acceptance of the Sync 002/003 log path against the REAL gated relay (RelayServer + WebSocketMessagingAdapter + the real Yjs and Automerge replication adapters). Test-only package.

scripts.pretest: pnpm --filter @web_of_trust/core build && pnpm --filter @web_of_trust/adapter-yjs build && pnpm --filter @web_of_trust/adapter-automerge build
